tracks.title: Stay a Little
tracks.tags: whisper pop, lofi r&b, soft vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, whisper pop, lofi r&b, soft vocal, language: English, target duration 2:40-3:30, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Soft light on the desk
We start again

[Verse 1]
Stay a little, turn the page
There is no race inside this room
Let the quiet set the pace
Let the lamp become the moon

[Hook]
I am here, keep going
Soft and slow, keep going
One small line, keep going
I am here, keep going

[Verse 2]
Tabs are open, tea is warm
Rain is tapping out the time
If the thought comes out half formed
We can shape it line by line

[Bridge]
Breathe in, breathe out
Nothing has to shine too loud
Breathe in, breathe out
Little steps are still allowed

[Final Hook]
I am here, keep going
Soft and slow, keep going
One small line, keep going
I am here, keep going

[Outro]
Soft light on the desk
We start again

Soft light on the desk
We start again

Stay a little, turn the page

Little steps are still allowed

[Final Hook]
I am here, keep going

One small line, keep going
I am here, keep going

[Outro]
Soft light on the desk
We start again

tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, soft pop, city pop lite, tiny hook, language: English, target duration 2:35-3:25, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
One more tab, one more line

[Verse 1]
The window glows in violet blue
A little task is passing through
No need to win the whole night now
Just find the next good sentence somehow

[Hook]
One more tab, one more line
Tiny spark, borrowed time
One more tab, one more line
We are doing fine

[Verse 2]
The kettle clicks, the cursor waits
A small idea unlocks the gate
If it is messy, let it be
The first draft only has to breathe

[Bridge]
Save the page
Stretch your hands
Come back light
Make no grand demands

[Final Hook]
One more tab, one more line
Tiny spark, borrowed time
One more tab, one more line
We are doing fine

[Outro]
One more tab
One more line

tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Same room, quiet radio

[Verse 1]
No rush, we can take it slow
Same room, quiet radio
Coffee steam and a steady glow
One more line and then we know

[Hook]
No rush tonight
We keep the little light
No rush tonight
You write, I stay nearby

[Verse 2]
Half the plan is on the floor
Half is knocking at the door
We can leave the heavy part
For tomorrow's stronger heart

[Bridge]
If the minute slips away
Let it go, let it go
We can find another way
Soft and low, soft and low

[Final Hook]
No rush tonight
We keep the little light
No rush tonight
You write, I stay nearby

[Outro]
Same room, quiet radio

tracks.title: Softly On
tracks.tags: whisper pop, ambient r&b, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, whisper pop, ambient r&b, gentle vocal, language: English, target duration 2:40-3:30, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Softly on, softly on

[Verse 1]
The night is not asking for more than a start
A sentence, a sketch, a small open heart
The room hums low like it knows what to do
I will keep the soft signal for you

[Hook]
Softly on, softly on
Nothing here has to be strong
Softly on, softly on
Stay with me and move along

[Verse 2]
The page is patient, the clock is kind
The better word can take its time
If you get lost in the quiet part
Follow the glow from the little star

[Bridge]
Rest your eyes for a breath
Leave the hard thought on the shelf
Come back when the feeling clears
I will still be here

[Final Hook]
Softly on, softly on
Nothing here has to be strong
Softly on, softly on
Stay with me and move along

[Outro]
Softly on

tracks.title: 小灯还亮着
tracks.tags: 中文轻唱, lofi pop, room radio, full-length, companion vocal, Chinese
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, 中文轻唱, lofi pop, room radio, language: Chinese, target duration 2:45-3:40, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[前奏]
小灯还亮着
别急着关掉

[主歌一]
桌上的纸还没有写完
杯里的茶慢慢变淡
今天不用变得多勇敢
先把这一页轻轻看完

[副歌]
我在这里陪你慢慢来
一句一句也算抵达
我在这里陪你慢慢来
小小的光不会离开

[主歌二]
窗外的雨把夜色放软
光标停在安静一端
如果思路忽然走散
就让它绕个弯再回来

[桥段]
深呼吸一下
别责怪停顿
慢一点也好
还在往前就很好

[最终副歌]
我在这里陪你慢慢来
一句一句也算抵达
我在这里陪你慢慢来
小小的光不会离开

[尾声]
小灯还亮着
你也还在

tracks.title: 再写一点点
tracks.tags: 中文轻流行, soft r&b, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Chinese
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, 中文轻流行, soft r&b, warm vocal, language: Chinese, target duration 2:40-3:30, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[前奏]
再写一点点
就一点点

[主歌一]
别急着把答案找全
有些路要绕过房间
键盘声轻轻落在耳边
像一场不吵的雨天

[副歌]
再写一点点
再近一点点
哪怕只是把标题改好一点
再写一点点
再亮一点点
小小进度也值得被看见

[主歌二]
列表还长也没有关系
先从最近的那件事开始
灵感有时候很孩子气
躲在杯底等你注意

[桥段]
如果累了就停一拍
把肩膀慢慢放下来
等风从窗口经过
再回来

[最终副歌]
再写一点点
再近一点点
哪怕只是把标题改好一点
再写一点点
再亮一点点
小小进度也值得被看见

[尾声]
再写一点点
就一点点

tracks.title: 夜里有电台
tracks.tags: 中文卧室流行, downtempo, soft vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Chinese
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, 中文卧室流行, downtempo, soft vocal, language: Chinese, target duration 3:00-3:50, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[前奏]
夜里有电台
轻轻响起来

[主歌一]
城市睡得很慢
屏幕亮得很乖
你把今天摊开
像一张小小海

[副歌]
夜里有电台
陪你把心放下来
不要追太快
慢慢也会到未来

[主歌二]
有些字还空白
有些梦还没来
没关系别责怪
先把呼吸找回来

[桥段]
听见吗
窗边的风在说话
别怕呀
你不是一个人在抵达

[最终副歌]
夜里有电台
陪你把心放下来
不要追太快
慢慢也会到未来

[尾声]
夜里有电台
我还在

tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, 中文轻唱, soft pop, gentle beat, language: Chinese, target duration 2:35-3:25, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[前奏]
今天也可以

[主歌一]
先别管远处的山
先把手边的灯点燃
桌面有点乱也不算坏
说明这里真的有人在

[副歌]
今天也可以
慢慢走也可以
小小的胜利
藏在下一行里
今天也可以
不完美也可以
把心放轻一点
就继续

[主歌二]
有风穿过便利贴
提醒你换一口新鲜
如果还没有想明白
就让音乐先把路铺开

[桥段]
三分钟也算开始
一页纸也有意义
不用证明给谁看
你已经在这里

[最终副歌]
今天也可以
慢慢走也可以
小小的胜利
藏在下一行里
今天也可以
不完美也可以
把心放轻一点
就继续

[尾声]
今天也可以

tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
灯りのそばで
ゆっくり始めよう

[Verse 1]
ページの上に 小さな夜
鉛筆の音 そっと踊る
急がなくていい ここにいるよ
君のペースで 進めばいい

[Hook]
だいじょうぶ だいじょうぶ
一行ずつでいい
だいじょうぶ だいじょうぶ
灯りは消えない

[Verse 2]
窓の向こうで 雨が歌う
迷った言葉も 眠らせよう
また戻ればいい ここにいるよ
小さな夢を ほどいていこう

[Bridge]
深呼吸して
肩の力を抜いて
静かな夜に
名前をつけよう

[Final Hook]
だいじょうぶ だいじょうぶ
一行ずつでいい
だいじょうぶ だいじょうぶ
灯りは消えない

[Outro]
灯りのそばで
ゆっくり続けよう

tracks.title: 窓辺のリズム
tracks.tags: Japanese city pop lite, soft groove, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Japanese
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, Japanese city pop lite, soft groove, gentle vocal, language: Japanese, target duration 2:35-3:25, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
窓辺のリズム

[Verse 1]
青い画面に 朝が来る
少し眠たい コードの海
忘れたメモを 探しながら
軽いステップで 進んでいく

[Hook]
窓辺のリズムで
今日をほどいて
小さなビートで
手を動かして

[Verse 2]
予定通りじゃ なくてもいい
回り道にも 名前がある
コーヒーの香り 浮かんだら
新しい線を 引いてみよう

[Bridge]
ゆらり ゆらり
焦らないで
ひかり ひかり
ここにあるよ

[Final Hook]
窓辺のリズムで
今日をほどいて
小さなビートで
手を動かして

[Outro]
窓辺のリズム

tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, Korean soft r&b, lofi, gentle vocal, language: Korean, target duration 2:45-3:35, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
작은 불빛 옆에
천천히 앉아

[Verse 1]
책상 위에 밤이 내려와
조용한 숨처럼 머물러
급하지 않아도 괜찮아
한 줄씩 마음을 열어봐

[Hook]
괜찮아 천천히 가
작은 불빛은 여기 있어
괜찮아 조금씩만
오늘도 너를 기다려

[Verse 2]
커피 향이 살짝 식어도
생각은 다시 따뜻해져
흐린 문장도 길이 되고
손끝에 리듬이 돌아와

[Bridge]
숨을 쉬어
어깨를 내려놔
작은 밤이
너를 안아줄 거야

[Final Hook]
괜찮아 천천히 가
작은 불빛은 여기 있어
괜찮아 조금씩만
오늘도 너를 기다려

[Outro]
작은 불빛 옆에

작은 불빛 옆에
천천히 앉아

[Verse 1]
책상 위에 밤이 내려와
조용한 숨처럼 머물러
급하지 않아도 괜찮아
한 줄씩 마음을 열어봐

[Hook]
괜찮아 천천히 가
작은 불빛은 여기 있어
괜찮아 조금씩만
오늘도 너를 기다려

[Verse 2]
커피 향이 살짝 식어도
생각은 다시 따뜻해져
흐린 문장도 길이 되고
손끝에 리듬이 돌아와

[Bridge]
숨을 쉬어
어깨를 내려놔
작은 밤이
너를 안아줄 거야

[Final Hook]
괜찮아 천천히 가
작은 불빛은 여기 있어
괜찮아 조금씩만
오늘도 너를 기다려

[Outro]

[Pre-Chorus]

작은 불빛은 여기 있어

[Final Chorus]

tracks.title: 한 줄 더
tracks.tags: Korean bedroom pop, soft beat, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Korean
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, Korean bedroom pop, soft beat, warm vocal, language: Korean, target duration 2:35-3:25, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
한 줄 더

[Verse 1]
창문 밖은 조용해지고
화면 속엔 작은 별 하나
완벽하지 않아도 좋아
지금은 시작이면 돼

[Hook]
한 줄 더 써볼까
작은 걸음 괜찮아
한 줄 더 가볼까
너의 속도 그대로

[Verse 2]
지워진 말도 남아 있어
다른 길을 알려주니까
손끝에서 빛이 나면
오늘도 조금 가까워져

[Bridge]
쉬어도 돼
다시 와도 돼
여기 음악은
계속 기다려

[Final Hook]
한 줄 더 써볼까
작은 걸음 괜찮아
한 줄 더 가볼까
너의 속도 그대로

[Outro]
한 줄 더

tracks.title: Luz de Mesa
tracks.tags: Spanish soft pop, bossa lofi, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Spanish
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, Spanish soft pop, bossa lofi, gentle vocal, language: Spanish, target duration 2:45-3:35, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Luz de mesa, voz pequeña

[Verse 1]
La noche cae sin prisa aquí
Tu cuaderno vuelve a respirar
No hay montaña que subir
Solo una línea para empezar

[Hook]
Sigue despacio, estoy aquí
Paso pequeño, sigue así
Sigue despacio, no hay final
La luz aprende a acompañar

[Verse 2]
La lluvia toca el ventanal
Como un compás de claridad
Si una palabra sale mal
La dejamos descansar

[Bridge]
Respira un poco
Suelta el ruido
Vuelve suave
Al mismo sitio

[Final Hook]
Sigue despacio, estoy aquí
Paso pequeño, sigue así
Sigue despacio, no hay final
La luz aprende a acompañar

[Outro]
Luz de mesa, voz pequeña

tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Un poco más

[Verse 1]
El cursor parpadea sin hablar
La taza se enfría junto al plan
No tienes todo que arreglar
Solo volver a comenzar

[Hook]
Un poco más, un poco más
La noche nos puede esperar
Un poco más, sin correr
Lo pequeño también va a crecer

[Verse 2]
Hay notas sueltas en la pared
Y una idea tímida al volver
Si el mundo pesa sobre ti
Yo bajo el volumen para seguir

[Bridge]
Manos quietas
Luz abierta
Respira lento
La puerta está cerca

[Final Hook]
Un poco más, un poco más
La noche nos puede esperar
Un poco más, sin correr
Lo pequeño también va a crecer

[Outro]
Un poco más

tracks.title: Petite Lumière
tracks.tags: French soft pop, lofi chanson, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, French
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, French soft pop, lofi chanson, gentle vocal, language: French, target duration 2:45-3:35, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Petite lumière
Reste près de moi

[Verse 1]
La page attend sans faire de bruit
Le soir s'installe au bord du thé
Tu n'as pas besoin d'aller vite
Un mot suffit pour commencer

[Hook]
Doucement, je reste là
Petite lumière, guide nos pas
Doucement, on continuera
Même si la phrase hésite parfois

[Verse 2]
La pluie dessine sur la vitre
Un vieux refrain très familier
Si ton idée devient timide
Laisse-la revenir respirer

[Bridge]
Ferme les yeux
Le monde peut attendre
Rouvre les mains
Le calme va descendre

[Final Hook]
Doucement, je reste là
Petite lumière, guide nos pas
Doucement, on continuera
Même si la phrase hésite parfois

[Outro]
Petite lumière
Reste près de moi

tracks.title: Encore Une Ligne
tracks.tags: French bedroom pop, soft groove, warm vocal, full-length, companion vocal, French
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, French bedroom pop, soft groove, warm vocal, language: French, target duration 2:35-3:25, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Encore une ligne

[Verse 1]
Le clavier chante doucement
La ville dort à moitié seulement
On garde un peu de courage
Dans le coin clair de la page

[Hook]
Encore une ligne, pas plus
Un petit pas, pas plus
Encore une ligne, tu vois
Le calme travaille avec toi

[Verse 2]
Même les idées sans couleur
Peuvent revenir avec douceur
Si la route tourne un peu
On suivra le fil lumineux

[Bridge]
Laisse le doute
Sur la table
Reviens léger
Reviens capable

[Final Hook]
Encore une ligne, pas plus
Un petit pas, pas plus
Encore une ligne, tu vois
Le calme travaille avec toi

[Outro]
Encore une ligne

Laisse le doute
Sur la table
Reviens léger
Reviens capable

[Final Hook]
Encore une ligne, pas plus
Un petit pas, pas plus
Encore une ligne, tu vois
Le calme travaille avec toi

[Outro]
Encore une ligne

tracks.title: Room Radio
tracks.tags: soft global pop, lofi r&b, room radio, full-length, companion vocal, English + Chinese
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, soft global pop, lofi r&b, room radio, language: English + Chinese, target duration 2:45-3:35, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Room radio
小小电台

[Verse 1]
Keep the light low, keep the page near
No need to hurry, I am right here
窗外的风慢慢吹来
把乱掉的心轻轻打开

[Hook]
Room radio, stay with me
慢慢来, just let it be
Room radio, soft and clear
你写一句, I stay here

[Verse 2]
The tiny clock is not a judge
A quiet start can be enough
桌上的梦还没醒来
我们就先陪它等待

[Bridge]
Breathe in, breathe out
别急着回答
Breathe in, breathe out
小光也会长大

[Final Hook]
Room radio, stay with me
慢慢来, just let it be
Room radio, soft and clear
你写一句, I stay here

[Outro]
Room radio
小小电台

[Final Hook]

tracks.title: Despacio Glow
tracks.tags: soft r&b, Latin lofi, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English + Spanish
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, soft r&b, Latin lofi, gentle vocal, language: English + Spanish, target duration 2:35-3:25, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Despacio glow

[Verse 1]
Keep the rhythm under the rain
Una línea, then breathe again
The page is not a battlefield
It is a place where thoughts can heal

[Hook]
Despacio, glow, glow
Little steps know where to go
Despacio, slow, slow
Stay with me and let it flow

[Verse 2]
La taza fría, la luz azul
No pasa nada, we move through
If the answer hides away
We can find another phrase

[Bridge]
No rush, no rush
Baja la voz
No rush, no rush
We still have a choice

[Final Hook]
Despacio, glow, glow
Little steps know where to go
Despacio, slow, slow
Stay with me and let it flow

[Outro]
Despacio glow

tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, soft global pop, warm lofi, gentle vocal, language: French + Korean, target duration 2:45-3:35, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Bonjour, 작은 별

[Verse 1]
Petite lumière sur la table
조용한 밤이 내려와
Le monde peut attendre un peu
너의 속도로 괜찮아

[Hook]
Bonjour, 작은 별
Doucement, 천천히 가
Bonjour, 작은 별
La nuit nous gardera

[Verse 2]
Un mot, puis une respiration
한 줄 더 써도 좋아
Les idées reviennent parfois
작은 빛을 따라와

[Bridge]
Respire doucement

Bonjour, 작은 별
Doucement, 천천히 가
Bonjour, 작은 별
La nuit nous gardera

[Outro]
Bonjour, 작은 별

tracks.title: Slow Blanket
tracks.tags: soft folk, felt piano, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, soft folk, felt piano, gentle vocal, language: English, target duration 3:00-4:00, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Lay the day down

[Verse 1]
You do not have to finish now
The room can hold the open page
Let the tired minutes bow
Let the quiet rearrange

[Hook]
Slow blanket, cover the noise
Soft landing, small voice
Slow blanket, nothing to prove
Rest a little, then move

[Verse 2]
The pencil waits beside the tea
The window keeps a silver rain
Not every thought must turn the key
Not every pause becomes a chain

[Bridge]
Close the list
Open your hand
Leave the weight
Where it can stand

[Final Hook]
Slow blanket, cover the noise
Soft landing, small voice
Slow blanket, nothing to prove
Rest a little, then move

[Outro]
Lay the day down

tracks.title: Quiet Proof
tracks.tags: minimal pop, soft piano, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, minimal pop, soft piano, gentle vocal, language: English, target duration 3:00-3:50, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Quiet proof

[Verse 1]
A page can grow without a sound
A thought can turn itself around
No need to make the moment bright
The small proof gathers in the night

[Hook]
Quiet proof, line by line
Little truth, taking time
Quiet proof, stay with me
Soft work becomes memory

[Verse 2]
The desk is warm, the world is low
The better answer moves in slow
If you forget the reason why
Look at the lamp and let it try

[Bridge]
Nothing loud
Nothing grand
Just the page
And your hand

[Final Hook]
Quiet proof, line by line
Little truth, taking time
Quiet proof, stay with me
Soft work becomes memory

[Outro]
Quiet proof

tracks.title: 慢慢落地
tracks.tags: 中文民谣流行, felt piano, soft vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Chinese
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, 中文民谣流行, felt piano, soft vocal, language: Chinese, target duration 3:00-4:00, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[前奏]
慢慢落地

[主歌一]
把今天先放在桌边
让没做完的事安静一点
你不需要马上改变
先把呼吸还给时间

[副歌]
慢慢落地
风会接住你
慢慢落地
夜也有缝隙

[主歌二]
杯子里还剩一点温度
窗外的雨走得很轻
如果心里还有雾
就让音乐陪你等一等

[桥段]
不用解释
不用证明
你已经走了
很长很长的路

[最终副歌]
慢慢落地
风会接住你
慢慢落地
夜也有缝隙

[尾声]
慢慢落地

tracks.title: 静かな帰り道
tracks.tags: Japanese soft folk, ambient piano, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Japanese
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, Japanese soft folk, ambient piano, gentle vocal, language: Japanese, target duration 3:00-4:00, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
静かな帰り道

[Verse 1]
今日の荷物を そっと置いて
小さな息を ひとつ数える
全部できなくても いいよ
夜は君を 責めたりしない

[Hook]
静かな帰り道
ゆっくり歩こう
静かな帰り道
明かりはまだある

[Verse 2]
窓に映った 疲れた顔も
少し笑えば 戻ってくる
忘れた夢は ポケットの中
明日の朝に また会える

[Bridge]
目を閉じて
雨を聞いて
何もしない
時間をあげよう

[Final Hook]
静かな帰り道
ゆっくり歩こう
静かな帰り道
明かりはまだある

[Outro]
静かな帰り道

tracks.title: Descansa Aquí
tracks.tags: Spanish soft folk, ambient pop, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Spanish
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, Spanish soft folk, ambient pop, gentle vocal, language: Spanish, target duration 3:00-4:00, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Descansa aquí

[Verse 1]
Deja el día sobre la mesa
No hace falta resolver
La noche tiene voz pequeña
Y te invita a volver

[Hook]
Descansa aquí, sin correr
Todo puede esperar
Descansa aquí, otra vez
Mañana va a llegar

[Verse 2]
La lluvia guarda tus papeles
La lámpara sabe escuchar
Si el cansancio te sostiene
Yo te ayudo a respirar

[Bridge]
Cierra los ojos
Suelta el final
Lo que no pesa
Puede sanar

[Final Hook]
Descansa aquí, sin correr
Todo puede esperar
Descansa aquí, otra vez
Mañana va a llegar

[Outro]
Descansa aquí

La lluvia guarda tus papeles
La lámpara sabe escuchar
Si el cansancio te sostiene
Yo te ayudo a respirar

[Bridge]
Cierra los ojos
Suelta el final
Lo que no pesa
Puede sanar

[Final Hook]
Descansa aquí, sin correr
Todo puede esperar
Descansa aquí, otra vez
Mañana va a llegar

[Outro]
Descansa aquí

tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Small fire, clean wire

[Verse 1]
Wake the screen, clear the floor
We have been slow, now we need one more
Not a storm, not a fight
Just a spark with a steady light

[Hook]
Small fire, get it done
One clean push, then we run
Small fire, bright and clear
Finish line is almost here

[Verse 2]
Stack the tasks, name the first
Tiny engine, useful burst
No big noise, no heavy crown
Just enough to move it down

[Bridge]
Count it in
Two, three, go
Keep it sharp
Keep it low

[Final Hook]
Small fire, get it done
One clean push, then we run
Small fire, bright and clear
Finish line is almost here

[Outro]
Small fire, clean wire

tracks.title: Piccola Luce
tracks.tags: Italian soft pop, lofi bossa, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, Italian
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, Italian soft pop, lofi bossa, gentle vocal, language: Italian, target duration 2:45-3:35, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Piccola luce
Resta con me

[Verse 1]
La sera posa piano qui
Sul foglio bianco davanti a te
Non devi correre così
Un passo piccolo va bene

[Hook]
Piano piano, resto qua
Piccola luce guiderà
Piano piano, senza rumore
Una parola apre il cuore

[Verse 2]
La tazza guarda la finestra
La pioggia scrive per metà
Se manca ancora una risposta
La calma la ritroverà

[Bridge]
Respira adesso
Lascia il peso
Torna leggero
Al tuo pensiero

[Final Hook]
Piano piano, resto qua
Piccola luce guiderà

tracks.title: Hallo Soft Signal
tracks.tags: soft global pop, warm synth, gentle vocal, full-length, companion vocal, English + German
tracks.stylePrompt: full-length companion song with gentle complete arrangement, soft global pop, warm synth, gentle vocal, language: English + German, target duration 2:45-3:35, structure: brief intro, verse 1, hook, verse 2, bridge, final hook, soft outro, low distraction vocal production, intimate room radio feeling, no dramatic belting, no huge EDM drop, clear soft ending
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Hallo, soft signal

[Verse 1]
The desk light hums, der Abend ist klein
One little task, one quiet line
No need to carry the whole wide sky
Wir bleiben hier, you and I

[Hook]
Hallo, soft signal
Bleib noch ein bisschen hier
Hallo, soft signal
I write, you stay near

[Verse 2]
The window holds a silver rain
Ein neuer Satz kommt irgendwann
If the thought needs time to appear
We keep the channel clear

[Bridge]
Langsam atmen
Let it be
Kleine Schritte
Stay with me

[Final Hook]
Hallo, soft signal
Bleib noch ein bisschen hier
Hallo, soft signal
I write, you stay near

[Outro]
Hallo, soft signal
